<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Push health score history for a device"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/api/v1/history/health-scores/{deviceEui}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Push health score history for a device

<Heading
  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

<ParamsDetails
  parameters={[{"in":"path","name":"deviceEui","required":true,"schema":{"type":"string"}}]}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

<RequestSchema
  title={"Body"}
  body={{"required":true,"content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","required":["scores"],"properties":{"resourceType":{"type":"string"},"resourceId":{"type":"string"},"scores":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","required":["timestamp","overall","battery","connectivity","signalQuality","dataQuality"],"properties":{"timestamp":{"type":"string","format":"date-time"},"overall":{"type":"number"},"battery":{"type":"number"},"connectivity":{"type":"number"},"signalQuality":{"type":"number"},"dataQuality":{"type":"number"}},"title":"HealthScore"}}}}}}}}
>
  
</RequestSchema>

<StatusCodes
  responses={{"200":{"description":"Sync result","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"synced":{"type":"number"},"serverTotal":{"type":"number"}}}}}},"400":{"description":"Request validation error","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"401":{"description":"Missing/invalid credentials","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}},"403":{"description":"Insufficient permission","content":{"application/json":{"schema":{"type":"object","properties":{"error":{"type":"string"}},"title":"ErrorResponse"}}}}}}
>
  
</StatusCodes>
